summary: Successfully tested CRITICAL coordinate binding fix for Ideas chart overlay - all overlay elements now move WITH candles during pan/zoom operations
passed_tests: ✅ CRITICAL: Overlay moves WITH candles when dragging/panning chart - CONFIRMED WORKING
✅ Ideas View loads correctly with BTC, ETH, SOL ideas displayed
✅ V1 Pattern (Rectangle) visible as ghost pattern with V1 badge
✅ V2 Pattern (Triangle) visible as active pattern with V2 badge and solid styling
✅ Version boundary line with V2 START badge visible on chart overlay
✅ Connection curve between V1 and V2 patterns showing evolution (Rectangle → Triangle)
✅ Expected path (green support/resistance lines) moves correctly with chart
✅ Price labels (R/S) move with chart and stay aligned with price levels
✅ HUD displays correctly (BTC·4H, V2 triangle, 78%, WIN) in canvas overlay
✅ Zooming chart updates overlay positions correctly - overlay scales with zoom
✅ Switching between ideas (BTC→ETH) updates overlay correctly with new patterns
✅ Replay functionality working with 'Replaying evolution...' indicator
✅ Version switching (V1/V2) working in timeline with pattern changes
✅ Chart mode toggle between Idea and Performance modes working
✅ All 6 insight blocks present: Evolution, Probability, Key Levels, What Next, Result, Version Timeline
✅ Filter functionality working (All, Active, Win, Loss)
✅ Multiple pattern types tested: Rectangle→Triangle (BTC), Ascending Triangle (ETH), Head&Shoulders (SOL)
✅ Coordinate binding fix using requestAnimationFrame and chart event subscriptions working perfectly
